headlines.headline: Wyrnik Sciences confirms participation in Annual Industry Forum

sentiment.reasoning: Participation in an industry forum is a routine corporate event with negligible direct financial impact.

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co secures $500M contract with a multinational manufacturer

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
